Please continue with the first milestone. 
I will delete the sln file. 
It exists now in the dump but it will be gone. 
Do not generate it again. 
Remember, we should use the latest standard. 
The latest standard is * dot slnX file 
Never forget. 
Ok now keep all our guidelines in mind 
whenever you write code or update code 
you should also update the documentation 
as well as any tests
